## What

One-paragraph summary of the change.

## Why

The motivation. Link an issue if there is one.

## Iron-law checklist

- [ ] Failing test written first
- [ ] Test fails for the expected reason
- [ ] Minimal implementation
- [ ] All tests pass: `make test`
- [ ] Release build clean: `make release`
- [ ] Man page + completions + README updated if the user surface changed
- [ ] One commit, single-purpose message

## Verification

How a reviewer should reproduce that this works.
